# LKB Jewellers

> LKB Jewellers (Local Kettle Brothers) is an independent luxury watch and engagement ring dealer based in London, UK. They specialise in pre-owned and new Rolex, Audemars Piguet, Cartier, Patek Philippe, and Richard Mille watches, as well as bespoke engagement rings. Known for competitive pricing, personal service, and celebrity clientele.

## Watches

- [Shop All Watches](https://www.lkbjewellers.com/shop): Browse the full collection of luxury pre-owned and new watches
- [Rolex](https://www.lkbjewellers.com/shop/rolex): Rolex watches including Submariner, Daytona, Datejust, GMT-Master II, Day-Date
- [Audemars Piguet](https://www.lkbjewellers.com/shop/audemars-piguet): AP Royal Oak, Royal Oak Offshore, and more
- [Cartier](https://www.lkbjewellers.com/shop/cartier): Cartier Santos, Tank, Ballon Bleu, Panthère
- [Patek Philippe](https://www.lkbjewellers.com/shop/patek-philippe): Patek Nautilus, Aquanaut, Calatrava
- [Richard Mille](https://www.lkbjewellers.com/shop/richard-mille): Richard Mille ultra-luxury sports watches

## Engagement Rings

- [Engagement Rings Collection](https://www.lkbjewellers.com/engagement-rings): Browse and configure bespoke engagement rings with choice of metal, diamond shape, setting, stone type, clarity, carat, and certification (GIA, IGI, HRD)

## Services

- [Sell Your Watch](https://www.lkbjewellers.com/sell): LKB buys pre-owned luxury watches at fair market prices
- [Bespoke Jewellery](https://www.lkbjewellers.com/bespoke): Custom jewellery design service with AI-assisted concept generation
- [Contact](https://www.lkbjewellers.com/contact): Enquire via phone, email, or WhatsApp

## About

- [About LKB Jewellers](https://www.lkbjewellers.com/about): The story of Local Kettle Brothers, their values, community work, and the LKB Foundation

## Blog

- [Blog](https://www.lkbjewellers.com/blog): Articles on luxury watches, engagement rings, brand breakdowns, and the LKB story
